    23→public enum TestServiceError: FatalError, Equatable {
    24→    case schemeNotFound(scheme: String, existing: [String])
    25→    case schemeWithoutTestableTargets(scheme: String, testPlan: String?)
    26→    case testPlanNotFound(scheme: String, testPlan: String, existing: [String])
    27→    case testIdentifierInvalid(value: String)
    28→    case duplicatedTestTargets(Set<TestIdentifier>)
    29→    case nothingToSkip(skipped: [TestIdentifier], included: [TestIdentifier])
    30→    case actionInvalid
    31→    case unspecifiedPlatform(target: String, platforms: [String])
    32→
    33→    // Error description
    34→
    35→    public var description: String {
    36→        switch self {
    37→        case let .schemeNotFound(scheme, existing):
    38→            return
    39→                "Couldn't find scheme \(scheme). The available schemes are: \(existing.joined(separator: ", "))."
    40→        case let .schemeWithoutTestableTargets(scheme, testPlan):
    41→            let testPlanMessage: String
    42→            if let testPlan, !testPlan.isEmpty {
    43→                testPlanMessage = "test plan \(testPlan) in "
    44→            } else {
    45→                testPlanMessage = ""
    46→            }
    47→            return
    48→                "The \(testPlanMessage)scheme \(scheme) cannot be built because it contains no buildable targets."
    49→        case let .testPlanNotFound(scheme, testPlan, existing):
    50→            let existingMessage: String
    51→            if existing.isEmpty {
    52→                existingMessage =
    53→                    "We could not execute the test plan \(testPlan) because the scheme \(scheme) doesn't have test plans defined."
    54→            } else {
    55→                existingMessage =
    56→                    "The test plan \(testPlan) in scheme \(scheme) doesn't exist. The following following test plans are defined: \(existing.joined(separator: ","))"
    57→            }
    58→            return "Couldn't find test plan \(testPlan) in scheme \(scheme). \(existingMessage)."
    59→        case let .testIdentifierInvalid(value):
    60→            return
    61→                "Invalid test identifiers \(value). The expected format is TestTarget[/TestClass[/TestMethod]]."
    62→        case let .duplicatedTestTargets(targets):
    63→            return
    64→                "The target identifier cannot be specified both in --test-targets and --skip-test-targets (were specified: \(targets.map(\.description).joined(separator: ", ")))"
    65→        case let .nothingToSkip(skippedTargets, includedTargets):
    66→            return
    67→                "Some of the targets specified in --skip-test-targets (\(skippedTargets.map(\.description).joined(separator: ", "))) will always be skipped as they are not included in the targets specified (\(includedTargets.map(\.description).joined(separator: ", ")))"
    68→        case .actionInvalid:
    69→            return "Cannot specify both --build-only and --without-building"
    70→        case let .unspecifiedPlatform(target, platforms):
    71→            return
    72→                "Only single platform targets supported. The target \(target) specifies multiple supported platforms (\(platforms.joined(separator: ", ")))."
    73→        }
    74→    }
    75→
    76→    // Error type
    77→
    78→    public var type: ErrorType {
    79→        switch self {
    80→        case .schemeNotFound, .schemeWithoutTestableTargets, .testPlanNotFound,
    81→             .testIdentifierInvalid, .duplicatedTestTargets,
    82→             .nothingToSkip, .actionInvalid, .unspecifiedPlatform:
    83→            return .abort
    84→        }
    85→    }
    86→}

   168→    public static func validateParameters(
   169→        testTargets: [TestIdentifier],
   170→        skipTestTargets: [TestIdentifier]
   171→    ) throws {
   172→        let targetsIntersection = Set(testTargets)
   173→            .intersection(skipTestTargets)
   174→        if !targetsIntersection.isEmpty {
   175→            throw TestServiceError.duplicatedTestTargets(targetsIntersection)
   176→        }
   177→    }

   179→    // swiftlint:disable:next function_body_length
   180→    public func run(
   181→        runId: String,
   182→        schemeName: String?,
   183→        clean: Bool,
   184→        noUpload: Bool,
   185→        configuration: String?,
   186→        path: AbsolutePath,
   187→        deviceName: String?,
   188→        platform: String?,
   189→        osVersion: String?,
   190→        action: XcodeBuildTestAction,
   191→        rosetta: Bool,
   192→        skipUITests: Bool,
   193→        skipUnitTests: Bool,
   194→        resultBundlePath: AbsolutePath?,
   195→        derivedDataPath: String?,
   196→        retryCount: Int,
   197→        testTargets: [TestIdentifier],
   198→        skipTestTargets: [TestIdentifier],
   199→        testPlanConfiguration: TestPlanConfiguration?,
   200→        validateTestTargetsParameters: Bool = true,
   201→        ignoreBinaryCache: Bool,
   202→        ignoreSelectiveTesting: Bool,
   203→        generateOnly: Bool,
   204→        passthroughXcodeBuildArguments: [String],
   205→        skipQuarantine: Bool = false
   206→    ) async throws {
   207→        if validateTestTargetsParameters {
   208→            try Self.validateParameters(
   209→                testTargets: testTargets,
   210→                skipTestTargets: skipTestTargets
   211→            )
   212→        }
   213→        // Load config
   214→        let config = try await configLoader.loadConfig(path: path)
   215→            .assertingIsGeneratedProjectOrSwiftPackage(
   216→                errorMessageOverride:
   217→                "The 'tuist test' command is for generated projects or Swift packages. Please use 'tuist xcodebuild test' instead."
   218→            )
   219→        let cacheStorage = try await cacheStorageFactory.cacheStorage(config: config)
   220→
   221→        let destination = try await destination(
   222→            arguments: passthroughXcodeBuildArguments,
   223→            deviceName: deviceName,
   224→            osVersion: osVersion
   225→        )
   226→
   227→        let testGenerator = generatorFactory.testing(
   228→            config: config,
   229→            testPlan: testPlanConfiguration?.testPlan,
   230→            includedTargets: Set(testTargets.map(\.target)),
   231→            excludedTargets: Set(skipTestTargets.filter { $0.class == nil }.map(\.target)),
   232→            skipUITests: skipUITests,
   233→            skipUnitTests: skipUnitTests,
   234→            configuration: configuration,
   235→            ignoreBinaryCache: ignoreBinaryCache,
   236→            ignoreSelectiveTesting: ignoreSelectiveTesting,
   237→            cacheStorage: cacheStorage,
   238→            destination: destination
   239→        )
   240→
   241→        Logger.current.notice("Generating project for testing", metadata: .section)
   242→        let (_, graph, mapperEnvironment) = try await testGenerator.generateWithGraph(
   243→            path: path,
   244→            options: config.project.generatedProject?.generationOptions
   245→        )
   246→
   247→        if generateOnly {
   248→            return
   249→        }
   250→
   251→        var skipTestTargets = skipTestTargets
   252→        skipTestTargets.append(
   253→            contentsOf: await quarantinedTestsToSkip(
   254→                skipQuarantine: skipQuarantine,
   255→                config: config
   256→            )
   257→        )
   258→
   259→        let graphTraverser = GraphTraverser(graph: graph)
   260→        let version = osVersion?.version()
   261→        let testableSchemes =
   262→            buildGraphInspector.testableSchemes(graphTraverser: graphTraverser)
   263→                + buildGraphInspector.workspaceSchemes(graphTraverser: graphTraverser)
   264→        Logger.current.log(
   265→            level: .debug,
   266→            "Found the following testable schemes: \(Set(testableSchemes.map(\.name)).joined(separator: ", "))"
   267→        )
   268→
   269→        let derivedDataPath = try derivedDataPath.map {
   270→            try AbsolutePath(
   271→                validating: $0,
   272→                relativeTo: FileHandler.shared.currentPath
   273→            )
   274→        }
   275→
   276→        let passedResultBundlePath = resultBundlePath
   277→
   278→        let runResultBundlePath =
   279→            try cacheDirectoriesProvider
   280→                .cacheDirectory(for: .runs)
   281→                .appending(components: runId, Constants.resultBundleName)
   282→
   283→        let resultBundlePath = try await self.resultBundlePath(
   284→            runResultBundlePath: runResultBundlePath,
   285→            passedResultBundlePath: passedResultBundlePath,
   286→            config: config
   287→        )
   288→
   289→        let schemes: [Scheme]
   290→        if let schemeName {
   291→            guard let scheme = graphTraverser.schemes().first(where: { $0.name == schemeName })
   292→            else {
   293→                let schemes =
   294→                    mapperEnvironment.initialGraph.map(GraphTraverser.init)?.schemes()
   295→                        ?? graphTraverser.schemes()
   296→                if let scheme = schemes.first(where: { $0.name == schemeName }) {
   297→                    Logger.current.log(
   298→                        level: .info,
   299→                        "The scheme \(schemeName)'s test action has no tests to run, finishing early."
   300→                    )
   301→                    await updateTestServiceAnalytics(
   302→                        mapperEnvironment: mapperEnvironment,
   303→                        schemes: [scheme],
   304→                        testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   305→                        action: action
   306→                    )
   307→                    return
   308→                } else {
   309→                    throw TestServiceError.schemeNotFound(
   310→                        scheme: schemeName,
   311→                        existing: Set(schemes.map(\.name)).map { $0 }
   312→                    )
   313→                }
   314→            }
   315→
   316→            await updateTestServiceAnalytics(
   317→                mapperEnvironment: mapperEnvironment,
   318→                schemes: [scheme],
   319→                testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   320→                action: action
   321→            )
   322→
   323→            switch (
   324→                testPlanConfiguration?.testPlan,
   325→                scheme.testAction?.targets.isEmpty,
   326→                scheme.testAction?.testPlans?.isEmpty
   327→            ) {
   328→            case (_, false, _), (_, _, false):
   329→                break
   330→            case (nil, true, _), (nil, nil, _):
   331→                Logger.current.log(
   332→                    level: .info,
   333→                    "The scheme \(schemeName)'s test action has no tests to run, finishing early."
   334→                )
   335→                return
   336→            case (_?, _, true), (_?, _, nil):
   337→                Logger.current.log(
   338→                    level: .info,
   339→                    "The scheme \(schemeName)'s test action has no test plans to run, finishing early."
   340→                )
   341→                return
   342→            default:
   343→                break
   344→            }
   345→
   346→            schemes = [scheme]
   347→        } else {
   348→            schemes = buildGraphInspector.workspaceSchemes(graphTraverser: graphTraverser)
   349→            await updateTestServiceAnalytics(
   350→                mapperEnvironment: mapperEnvironment,
   351→                schemes: schemes,
   352→                testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   353→                action: action
   354→            )
   355→        }
   356→
   357→        do {
   358→            try await testSchemes(
   359→                schemes,
   360→                graph: graph,
   361→                mapperEnvironment: mapperEnvironment,
   362→                cacheStorage: cacheStorage,
   363→                clean: clean,
   364→                noUpload: noUpload,
   365→                configuration: configuration,
   366→                version: version,
   367→                deviceName: deviceName,
   368→                platform: platform,
   369→                action: action,
   370→                rosetta: rosetta,
   371→                resultBundlePath: resultBundlePath,
   372→                derivedDataPath: derivedDataPath,
   373→                retryCount: retryCount,
   374→                testTargets: testTargets,
   375→                skipTestTargets: skipTestTargets,
   376→                testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   377→                passthroughXcodeBuildArguments: passthroughXcodeBuildArguments,
   378→                config: config
   379→            )
   380→        } catch {
   381→            try await copyResultBundlePathIfNeeded(
   382→                runResultBundlePath: runResultBundlePath,
   383→                resultBundlePath: resultBundlePath
   384→            )
   385→            throw error
   386→        }
   387→
   388→        try await copyResultBundlePathIfNeeded(
   389→            runResultBundlePath: runResultBundlePath,
   390→            resultBundlePath: resultBundlePath
   391→        )
   392→    }

   394→    // MARK: - Helpers
   395→
   396→    private func testSchemes(
   397→        _ schemes: [Scheme],
   398→        graph: Graph,
   399→        mapperEnvironment: MapperEnvironment,
   400→        cacheStorage: CacheStoring,
   401→        clean: Bool,
   402→        noUpload: Bool,
   403→        configuration: String?,
   404→        version: Version?,
   405→        deviceName: String?,
   406→        platform: String?,
   407→        action: XcodeBuildTestAction,
   408→        rosetta: Bool,
   409→        resultBundlePath: AbsolutePath?,
   410→        derivedDataPath: AbsolutePath?,
   411→        retryCount: Int,
   412→        testTargets: [TestIdentifier],
   413→        skipTestTargets: [TestIdentifier],
   414→        testPlanConfiguration: TestPlanConfiguration?,
   415→        passthroughXcodeBuildArguments: [String],
   416→        config: Tuist
   417→    ) async throws {
   418→        let timer = clock.startTimer()
   419→        let graphTraverser = GraphTraverser(graph: graph)
   420→        let testSchemes =
   421→            schemes
   422→                .filter {
   423→                    !testActionTargetReferences(
   424→                        scheme: $0, testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   425→                        action: action
   426→                    ).isEmpty
   427→                }
   428→
   429→        if !shouldRunTest(
   430→            for: schemes,
   431→            testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   432→            mapperEnvironment: mapperEnvironment,
   433→            graph: graph,
   434→            action: action
   435→        ) {
   436→            if action != .build {
   437→                try await uploadSkippedTestSummary(
   438→                    schemeName: schemes.first?.name,
   439→                    config: config,
   440→                    timer: timer
   441→                )
   442→            }
   443→            return
   444→        }
   445→
   446→        let uploadCacheStorage: CacheStoring
   447→        if noUpload {
   448→            uploadCacheStorage = try await cacheStorageFactory.cacheLocalStorage()
   449→        } else {
   450→            uploadCacheStorage = cacheStorage
   451→        }
   452→
   453→        do {
   454→            for testScheme in testSchemes {
   455→                try await self.testScheme(
   456→                    scheme: testScheme,
   457→                    graphTraverser: graphTraverser,
   458→                    clean: clean,
   459→                    configuration: configuration,
   460→                    version: version,
   461→                    deviceName: deviceName,
   462→                    platform: platform,
   463→                    action: action,
   464→                    rosetta: rosetta,
   465→                    resultBundlePath: resultBundlePath,
   466→                    derivedDataPath: derivedDataPath,
   467→                    retryCount: retryCount,
   468→                    testTargets: testTargets,
   469→                    skipTestTargets: skipTestTargets,
   470→                    testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   471→                    passthroughXcodeBuildArguments: passthroughXcodeBuildArguments,
   472→                    config: config
   473→                )
   474→            }
   475→        } catch {
   476→            // Check the test results and store successful test hashes for any targets that passed
   477→            let rootDirectory = try await rootDirectory()
   478→            guard action != .build, let resultBundlePath,
   479→                  let testSummary = try await xcResultService.parse(path: resultBundlePath, rootDirectory: rootDirectory)
   480→            else { throw error }
   481→
   482→            let testTargets = testActionTargets(
   483→                for: schemes, testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration, graph: graph, action: action
   484→            )
   485→
   486→            // Compute passing test target names from the test summary
   487→            // A target is passing if none of its tests failed
   488→            let testCasesByModule = Dictionary(grouping: testSummary.testCases) { $0.module }
   489→            let passingTestTargetNames = Set(
   490→                testCasesByModule.compactMap { module, testCases -> String? in
   491→                    guard let module else { return nil }
   492→                    return testCases.allSatisfy { $0.status != .failed } ? module : nil
   493→                }
   494→            )
   495→            let passingTestTargets = testTargets.filter {
   496→                passingTestTargetNames.contains($0.target.name)
   497→            }
   498→
   499→            try await storeSuccessfulTestHashes(
   500→                for: passingTestTargets,
   501→                graph: graph,
   502→                mapperEnvironment: mapperEnvironment,
   503→                cacheStorage: uploadCacheStorage
   504→            )
   505→
   506→            throw error
   507→        }
   508→
   509→        if action != .build {
   510→            try await storeSuccessfulTestHashes(
   511→                for: testActionTargets(
   512→                    for: schemes, testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration, graph: graph, action: action
   513→                ),
   514→                graph: graph,
   515→                mapperEnvironment: mapperEnvironment,
   516→                cacheStorage: uploadCacheStorage
   517→            )
   518→        }
   519→
   520→        let verb =
   521→            switch action {
   522→            case .test, .testWithoutBuilding:
   523→                "ran"
   524→            case .build:
   525→                "built"
   526→            }
   527→
   528→        AlertController.current.success(.alert("The project tests \(verb) successfully"))
   529→    }

   531→    private func updateTestServiceAnalytics(
   532→        mapperEnvironment: MapperEnvironment,
   533→        schemes: [Scheme],
   534→        testPlanConfiguration: TestPlanConfiguration?,
   535→        action: XcodeBuildTestAction
   536→    ) async {
   537→        let initialTestTargets = initialTestTargets(
   538→            mapperEnvironment: mapperEnvironment,
   539→            schemes: schemes,
   540→            testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   541→            action: action
   542→        )
   543→
   544→        await RunMetadataStorage.current.update(
   545→            selectiveTestingCacheItems: initialTestTargets.reduce(into: [:]) { result, element in
   546→                guard let hash = mapperEnvironment.targetTestHashes[element.path]?[
   547→                    element.target.name
   548→                ]
   549→                else { return }
   550→                let cacheItem =
   551→                    mapperEnvironment.targetTestCacheItems[element.path]?[element.target.name]
   552→                        ?? CacheItem(
   553→                            name: element.target.name,
   554→                            hash: hash,
   555→                            source: .miss,
   556→                            cacheCategory: .selectiveTests
   557→                        )
   558→                result[element.path, default: [:]][element.target.name] = cacheItem
   559→            }
   560→        )
   561→    }

   563→    private func copyResultBundlePathIfNeeded(
   564→        runResultBundlePath: AbsolutePath?,
   565→        resultBundlePath: AbsolutePath?
   566→    ) async throws {
   567→        if let runResultBundlePath, let resultBundlePath, runResultBundlePath != resultBundlePath {
   568→            guard try await fileSystem.exists(resultBundlePath) else { return }
   569→            if try await !fileSystem.exists(resultBundlePath.parentDirectory) {
   570→                try await fileSystem.makeDirectory(at: resultBundlePath.parentDirectory)
   571→            }
   572→            try await fileSystem.copy(
   573→                try await fileSystem.resolveSymbolicLink(resultBundlePath),
   574→                to: runResultBundlePath.parentDirectory.appending(
   575→                    components: "\(Constants.resultBundleName).xcresult"
   576→                )
   577→            )
   578→        }
   579→    }

   581→    private func shouldRunTest(
   582→        for schemes: [Scheme],
   583→        testPlanConfiguration: TestPlanConfiguration?,
   584→        mapperEnvironment: MapperEnvironment,
   585→        graph: Graph,
   586→        action: XcodeBuildTestAction
   587→    ) -> Bool {
   588→        let testActionTargets = testActionTargets(
   589→            for: schemes,
   590→            testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   591→            graph: graph,
   592→            action: action
   593→        )
   594→        .map(\.target)
   595→
   596→        let skippedTestTargets = initialTestTargets(
   597→            mapperEnvironment: mapperEnvironment,
   598→            schemes: schemes,
   599→            testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   600→            action: action
   601→        )
   602→        .filter { target in
   603→            !testActionTargets.contains(where: {
   604→                $0.bundleId == target.target.bundleId
   605→            })
   606→        }
   607→
   608→        let testSchemes =
   609→            schemes
   610→                .filter {
   611→                    !testActionTargetReferences(
   612→                        scheme: $0, testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration, action: action
   613→                    ).isEmpty
   614→                }
   615→
   616→        if testSchemes.isEmpty {
   617→            Logger.current.log(level: .info, "There are no tests to run, finishing early")
   618→            return false
   619→        }
   620→
   621→        if !skippedTestTargets.isEmpty {
   622→            Logger.current
   623→                .notice(
   624→                    "The following targets have not changed since the last successful run and will be skipped: \(skippedTestTargets.map(\.target.name).sorted().joined(separator: ", "))"
   625→                )
   626→        }
   627→
   628→        return true
   629→    }

   631→    private func initialTestTargets(
   632→        mapperEnvironment: MapperEnvironment,
   633→        schemes: [Scheme],
   634→        testPlanConfiguration: TestPlanConfiguration?,
   635→        action: XcodeBuildTestAction
   636→    ) -> [GraphTarget] {
   637→        guard let initialGraph = mapperEnvironment.initialGraph else { return [] }
   638→        let initialSchemes = GraphTraverser(graph: initialGraph).schemes()
   639→        return testActionTargets(
   640→            for:
   641→            initialSchemes
   642→                .filter { initialScheme in
   643→                    schemes.contains(where: { $0.name == initialScheme.name })
   644→                },
   645→            testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   646→            graph: initialGraph,
   647→            action: action
   648→        )

   651→    private func testActionTargets(
   652→        for schemes: [Scheme],
   653→        testPlanConfiguration: TestPlanConfiguration?,
   654→        graph: Graph,
   655→        action: XcodeBuildTestAction
   656→    ) -> [GraphTarget] {
   657→        return
   658→            schemes
   659→                .flatMap {
   660→                    testActionTargetReferences(scheme: $0, testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration, action: action)
   661→                }
   662→                .compactMap {
   663→                    guard let project = graph.projects[$0.projectPath],
   664→                          let target = project.targets[$0.name]
   665→                    else {
   666→                        return nil
   667→                    }
   668→                    return GraphTarget(path: project.path, target: target, project: project)
   669→                }
   670→    }

   672→    private func testActionTargetReferences(
   673→        scheme: Scheme,
   674→        testPlanConfiguration: TestPlanConfiguration?,
   675→        action: XcodeBuildTestAction
   676→    ) -> [TargetReference] {
   677→        let targets =
   678→            if let testPlanConfiguration {
   679→                scheme.testAction?.testPlans?
   680→                    .first(
   681→                        where: { $0.name == testPlanConfiguration.testPlan }
   682→                    )?.testTargets.map(\.target) ?? []
   683→            } else if action == .build, let testPlans = scheme.testAction?.testPlans {
   684→                // If we are building a scheme that has testplans but none specified then we should return all test targets
   685→                testPlans.flatMap(\.testTargets).map(\.target)
   686→            } else if let defaultTestPlan = scheme.testAction?.testPlans?.first(where: {
   687→                $0.isDefault
   688→            }) {
   689→                defaultTestPlan.testTargets.map(\.target)
   690→            } else if let testActionTargets = scheme.testAction?.targets.map(\.target),
   691→                      !testActionTargets.isEmpty
   692→            {
   693→                testActionTargets
   694→            } else {
   695→                [TargetReference]()
   696→            }
   697→
   698→        return targets
   699→    }

   701→    private func storeSuccessfulTestHashes(
   702→        for targets: [GraphTarget],
   703→        graph _: Graph,
   704→        mapperEnvironment: MapperEnvironment,
   705→        cacheStorage: CacheStoring
   706→    ) async throws {
   707→        guard let initialGraph = mapperEnvironment.initialGraph else { return }
   708→        let graphTraverser = GraphTraverser(graph: initialGraph)
   709→
   710→        let testedGraphTargets: [GraphTarget] = targets.compactMap {
   711→            guard let project = initialGraph.projects[$0.path],
   712→                  let target = project.targets[$0.target.name]
   713→            else { return nil }
   714→            return GraphTarget(path: $0.path, target: target, project: project)
   715→        }
   716→        try await fileSystem.runInTemporaryDirectory(prefix: "test") { _ in
   717→            let allTestedTargets: Set<GraphTarget> = Set(
   718→                graphTraverser.allTargetDependencies(traversingFromTargets: testedGraphTargets)
   719→                    .union(testedGraphTargets)
   720→            )
   721→
   722→            let hashes =
   723→                allTestedTargets
   724→                    .filter {
   725→                        return mapperEnvironment.targetTestCacheItems[$0.path]?[$0.target.name] == nil
   726→                    }
   727→                    .compactMap { graphTarget -> (target: Target, hash: String)? in
   728→                        guard let hash = mapperEnvironment.targetTestHashes[graphTarget.path]?[
   729→                            graphTarget.target.name
   730→                        ]
   731→                        else { return nil }
   732→                        return (target: graphTarget.target, hash: hash)
   733→                    }
   734→
   735→            let cacheableItems: [CacheStorableItem: [AbsolutePath]] =
   736→                hashes
   737→                    .reduce(into: [:]) { acc, element in
   738→                        acc[CacheStorableItem(name: element.target.name, hash: element.hash)] = [
   739→                            AbsolutePath
   740→                        ]()
   741→                    }
   742→
   743→            try await cacheStorage.store(cacheableItems, cacheCategory: .selectiveTests)
   744→        }
   745→    }

   760→    // swiftlint:disable:next function_body_length
   761→    private func testScheme(
   762→        scheme: Scheme,
   763→        graphTraverser: GraphTraversing,
   764→        clean: Bool,
   765→        configuration: String?,
   766→        version: Version?,
   767→        deviceName: String?,
   768→        platform: String?,
   769→        action: XcodeBuildTestAction,
   770→        rosetta: Bool,
   771→        resultBundlePath: AbsolutePath?,
   772→        derivedDataPath: AbsolutePath?,
   773→        retryCount: Int,
   774→        testTargets: [TestIdentifier],
   775→        skipTestTargets: [TestIdentifier],
   776→        testPlanConfiguration: TestPlanConfiguration?,
   777→        passthroughXcodeBuildArguments: [String],
   778→        config: Tuist
   779→    ) async throws {
   780→        Logger.current.log(
   781→            level: .notice, "\(action.description) scheme \(scheme.name)", metadata: .section
   782→        )
   783→        if let testPlan = testPlanConfiguration?.testPlan,
   784→           let testPlans = scheme.testAction?.testPlans,
   785→           !testPlans.contains(where: { $0.name == testPlan })
   786→        {
   787→            throw TestServiceError.testPlanNotFound(
   788→                scheme: scheme.name,
   789→                testPlan: testPlan,
   790→                existing: testPlans.map(\.name)
   791→            )
   792→        }
   793→        guard let buildableTarget = buildGraphInspector.testableTarget(
   794→            scheme: scheme,
   795→            testPlan: testPlanConfiguration?.testPlan,
   796→            testTargets: testTargets,
   797→            skipTestTargets: skipTestTargets,
   798→            graphTraverser: graphTraverser,
   799→            action: action
   800→        )
   801→        else {
   802→            throw TestServiceError.schemeWithoutTestableTargets(
   803→                scheme: scheme.name, testPlan: testPlanConfiguration?.testPlan
   804→            )
   805→        }
   806→
   807→        let buildPlatform: XcodeGraph.Platform
   808→
   809→        if let platform {
   810→            buildPlatform = try XcodeGraph.Platform.from(commandLineValue: platform)
   811→        } else if let resolvedPlatform = buildableTarget.target.destinations.first?.platform,
   812→                  buildableTarget.target.destinations.platforms.count == 1
   813→        {
   814→            buildPlatform = resolvedPlatform
   815→        } else {
   816→            throw TestServiceError.unspecifiedPlatform(
   817→                target: buildableTarget.target.name,
   818→                platforms: buildableTarget.target.supportedPlatforms.map(\.rawValue)
   819→            )
   820→        }
   821→
   822→        let destination: XcodeBuildDestination?
   823→
   824→        if passthroughXcodeBuildArguments.contains("-destination") {
   825→            destination = nil
   826→        } else {
   827→            destination = try await XcodeBuildDestination.find(
   828→                for: buildableTarget.target,
   829→                on: buildPlatform,
   830→                scheme: scheme,
   831→                version: version,
   832→                deviceName: deviceName,
   833→                graphTraverser: graphTraverser,
   834→                simulatorController: simulatorController
   835→            )
   836→        }
   837→
   838→        let projectDerivedDataDirectory: AbsolutePath?
   839→        if let derivedDataPath {
   840→            projectDerivedDataDirectory = derivedDataPath
   841→        } else {
   842→            projectDerivedDataDirectory = try? await derivedDataLocator.locate(
   843→                for: graphTraverser.workspace.xcWorkspacePath
   844→            )
   845→        }
   846→
   847→        do {
   848→            try await xcodebuildController.test(
   849→                .workspace(graphTraverser.workspace.xcWorkspacePath),
   850→                scheme: scheme.name,
   851→                clean: clean,
   852→                destination: destination,
   853→                action: action,
   854→                rosetta: rosetta,
   855→                derivedDataPath: derivedDataPath,
   856→                resultBundlePath: resultBundlePath,
   857→                arguments: buildGraphInspector.buildArguments(
   858→                    project: buildableTarget.project,
   859→                    target: buildableTarget.target,
   860→                    configuration: configuration,
   861→                    skipSigning: false
   862→                ),
   863→                retryCount: retryCount,
   864→                testTargets: testTargets,
   865→                skipTestTargets: skipTestTargets,
   866→                testPlanConfiguration: testPlanConfiguration,
   867→                passthroughXcodeBuildArguments: passthroughXcodeBuildArguments
   868→            )
   869→        } catch {
   870→            await inspectResultBundleIfNeeded(
   871→                resultBundlePath: resultBundlePath,
   872→                projectDerivedDataDirectory: projectDerivedDataDirectory,
   873→                config: config,
   874→                action: action
   875→            )
   876→            throw error
   877→        }
   878→
   879→        await inspectResultBundleIfNeeded(
   880→            resultBundlePath: resultBundlePath,
   881→            projectDerivedDataDirectory: projectDerivedDataDirectory,
   882→            config: config,
   883→            action: action
   884→        )
   885→    }

   887→    private func inspectResultBundleIfNeeded(
   888→        resultBundlePath: AbsolutePath?,
   889→        projectDerivedDataDirectory: AbsolutePath?,
   890→        config: Tuist,
   891→        action: XcodeBuildTestAction
   892→    ) async {
   893→        guard let resultBundlePath, config.fullHandle != nil, action != .build,
   894→              (try? await fileSystem.exists(resultBundlePath)) == true
   895→        else { return }
   896→
   897→        do {
   898→            _ = try await inspectResultBundleService.inspectResultBundle(
   899→                resultBundlePath: resultBundlePath,
   900→                projectDerivedDataDirectory: projectDerivedDataDirectory,
   901→                config: config
   902→            )
   903→        } catch {
   904→            AlertController.current.warning(.alert("Failed to upload test results: \(error.localizedDescription)"))
   905→        }
   906→    }

   908→    private func destination(
   909→        arguments: [String],
   910→        deviceName: String?,
   911→        osVersion: String?
   912→    ) async throws -> SimulatorDeviceAndRuntime? {
   913→        if let deviceName {
   914→            let os: XcodeGraph.Version?
   915→            if let osVersion {
   916→                os = XcodeGraph.Version(string: osVersion)
   917→            } else {
   918→                os = nil
   919→            }
   920→            return try await simulatorController.findAvailableDevice(
   921→                deviceName: deviceName,
   922→                version: os.map { TSCUtility.Version($0.major, $0.minor, $0.patch) }
   923→            )
   924→        }
   925→        let parsedArguments =
   926→            try await xcodeBuildAgumentParser
   927→                .parse(arguments)
   928→        if let destination = parsedArguments.destination {
   929→            if let id = destination.id {
   930→                return try await simulatorController.findAvailableDevice(udid: id)
   931→            } else if let name = destination.name {
   932→                return try await simulatorController.findAvailableDevice(
   933→                    deviceName: name,
   934→                    version: destination.os.map { TSCUtility.Version($0.major, $0.minor, $0.patch) }
   935→                )
   936→            }
   937→        }
   938→
   939→        return nil
   940→    }

   998→    private func quarantinedTestsToSkip(
   999→        skipQuarantine: Bool,
  1000→        config: Tuist
  1001→    ) async -> [TestIdentifier] {
  1002→        guard !skipQuarantine, let fullHandle = config.fullHandle else {
  1003→            return []
  1004→        }
  1005→        do {
  1006→            let serverURL = try serverEnvironmentService.url(configServerURL: config.url)
  1007→            let quarantinedTests = try await fetchQuarantinedTests(
  1008→                fullHandle: fullHandle,
  1009→                serverURL: serverURL
  1010→            )
  1011→            if !quarantinedTests.isEmpty {
  1012→                Logger.current.notice(
  1013→                    "Skipping \(quarantinedTests.count) quarantined test(s)",
  1014→                    metadata: .subsection
  1015→                )
  1016→            }
  1017→            return quarantinedTests
  1018→        } catch {
  1019→            AlertController.current.warning(
  1020→                .alert("Failed to fetch quarantined tests: \(error.localizedDescription). Running all tests.")
  1021→            )
  1022→            return []
  1023→        }
  1024→    }

  1026→    private func fetchQuarantinedTests(
  1027→        fullHandle: String,
  1028→        serverURL: URL
  1029→    ) async throws -> [TestIdentifier] {
  1030→        let response = try await listTestCasesService.listTestCases(
  1031→            fullHandle: fullHandle,
  1032→            serverURL: serverURL,
  1033→            flaky: nil,
  1034→            quarantined: true,
  1035→            page: 1,
  1036→            pageSize: 500
  1037→        )
  1038→
  1039→        return try response.test_cases.map { testCase in
  1040→            try TestIdentifier(
  1041→                target: testCase.module.name,
  1042→                class: testCase.suite?.name,
  1043→                method: testCase.name
  1044→            )
  1045→        }
  1046→    }
  1047→}
